raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citibank denied my dispute for a fraudulent charge of {$790.00} made on XX/XX/year> via XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ) and is refusing to reopen the investigation, despite clear evidence of fraud and non-delivery. Case Number XXXX. 

I submitted a dispute to Citi after being scammed by an online seller who never delivered the promised goods and stopped responding after receiving payment. I provided supporting documents and evidence to Citi. Despite clear evidence that this was a fraudulent charge for goods/services never received, I was informed that the case has been closed and can not be reopened because I missed a follow-up documentation deadline, a deadline I was unaware of due to not receiving ( or not noticing ) the request. 

The merchant provided no legitimate proof of delivery, and XXXX own dispute process also failed to resolve the matter. I trusted my bank to protect me under Regulation Z protections, but now I am being told I have no further recourse despite having evidence that no goods were ever received. This was a holiday scam : the merchant ceased communication immediately after payment, provided no tracking or delivery. The documentation the merchant submitted was misleading, and I trusted Citi to assist me under federal consumer protection regulations.

I am requesting CFPB assistance to : Urge Citibank to reconsider and reopen the dispute under the context of fraud.

Ensure that the bank followed all appropriate timelines, notices, and consumer protections as required under federal law.

Amount disputed : {$790.00} Supporting documents available : Email records, XXXX dispute history, seller communication attempts, Citi dispute letters.
